title: Setting Up Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA / TOTP)
text:
Q: How do I set up multi-factor authentication (MFA) using TOTP for my account?
A: To set up multi-factor authentication (MFA) using Time-based One-Time Password (TOTP), follow these steps: Step 1: Download and install a TOTP authenticator app on your mobile device, such as Google Authenticator, Authy, or Microsoft Authenticator. Step 2: Log in to your company account and navigate to the 'Security Settings' section. Step 3: Look for the option labeled 'Enable Multi-Factor Authentication' or 'Set Up TOTP'. Step 4: Click on 'Generate QR Code' to display the QR code on your screen. Step 5: Open your authenticator app and use it to scan the QR code. Step 6: The app will generate a 6-digit code; enter this code into the provided field on your account setup page. Step 7: Click 'Verify' to confirm the setup. Step 8: Make sure to save any backup codes provided, as they will be needed if you lose access to your authenticator app. Step 9: Log out and log back in to test that MFA is working correctly. If you encounter any issues, please contact the IT helpdesk for assistance.
